name: BrandGuesser
short: Guess the brand from a progressively revealed logo!
description: A logo guessing game. Pick a random brand, reveal stages every 10 seconds, show original on win or timeout.
author: jamescvermont-cyber
install_msg: Load with: `[p]cog load brandguesser`. Start a game with `$bg`.
end_user_data_statement: This cog does not store any end user data.
